scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run css:watch & css_pid=$!; trap "kill $css_pid 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; npm run shadow:watch'
scripts.compile: npm run css:build && clojure -M:shadow compile dev
scripts.release: npm run css:release && clojure -M:shadow release release
scripts.test:e2e:release: npm run release && mkdir -p target/release/public && cp public/index.html target/release/public/index.html && playwright test -c playwright.release.config.ts
scripts.verify: npm run lint:clj && npm run compile && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:release
